content: Supabase auth: NEVER use getSession() for authorization in server code/middleware — cookie-derived, spoofable, not guaranteed revalidated. Always use getUser() (or getClaims) which round-trips to the Supabase Auth server to revalidate the token. For an owner-only /admin gate: server-component/layout calls getUser(), compares email/id to an allowlist (env or DB), redirect/404 if not owner. Middleware should refresh session but not be the only gate; defense-in-depth with RLS at data layer.
